entity.summary: Native decentralized exchange on GalaChain providing self-custodial token swaps, concentrated liquidity pools, market tracking, portfolio views, and on-chain settlement.
entity.notes: HEI consolidates duplicate Gala Swap discovery rows into one GalaSwap entity. Current first-party exchange surface describes GalaSwap as the native GalaChain DEX with self-custodial swaps, concentrated liquidity, live market data, and portfolio management.

evidence.title: GalaSwap official exchange application
evidence.notes: Current first-party exchange surface identifies GalaSwap as a decentralized exchange built natively on GalaChain and documents self-custodial swaps and on-chain settlement.

evidence.title: GalaSwap trading and liquidity features
evidence.notes: Current first-party application page documents supported token swaps, concentrated liquidity provision, pool APR and volume views, portfolio positions, historical swaps, and fee tiers.

evidence.title: GalaChain SDK documentation
evidence.notes: First-party GalaChain SDK documentation exposes token-swap request, fill, indexing, and query primitives that support the chain-level exchange functionality used by GalaChain trading applications.
